description: ['Give your trusty blues the day off. In a clean wash, these skinny jeans are a slick, sharp option. Also, their classic five-pocket construction and slight stretch will keep them on heavy rotation. ', 'Woven', 'Zip fly', '79% cotton, 20% polyester, 1% spandex', '31.5" inseam, 34" waist, 10" rise', 'Measured from Size 32', 'Machine wash cold', 'Made in China']

description: ['Classic in their clean wash and slim fit, these jeans are ideal for work and off-duty weekend looks alike. Complete with a five-pocket construction to easily keep things like your cash and keys organized, this will become your go-to pair for dressing and dashing (while still looking dapper). ', 'Zip fly', 'Lightweight, woven', '32" inseam, 32" waist, 10" rise', 'Measured from Size 32', '100% cotton', 'Machine wash cold', 'Imported']
text: Classic in their clean wash and slim fit, these jeans are ideal for work and off-duty weekend looks alike. Complete with a five-pocket construction to easily keep things like your cash and keys organized, this will become your go-to pair for dressing and dashing (while still looking dapper).  || Zip fly || Lightweight, woven || 32" inseam, 32" waist, 10" rise || Measured from Size 32 || 100% cotton || Machine wash cold
